description: Overview of all nodes, services, power, network, AI usage, and storage across the home LAN.

targets.expr: sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_a_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_b_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_c_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_d_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_e_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_f_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_g_power or vector(0)) + sum(snoc_pinewood_plug_h_power or vector(0))

panels.title: WiFi Signal Strength
panels.description: WiFi signal strength per node. Closer to 0 is better.

panels.title: Lemonade Tokens/s
panels.description: Token generation rate per Lemonade server node.

panels.title: Lemonade TTFT
panels.description: Time to first token per Lemonade server node.

panels.title: 1-Minute Load Average
panels.description: 1-minute load average per node. Values above core count indicate overload.

title: Home LAN Overview
